title: Introduces Vivarium codename; contradiction-graph table
public_claim: Vivarium continuation pack is a Red Team Lab handoff introducing the Vivarium visual-system codename and contradiction-graph table.
distinctive_mechanism: It preserves a seven-directory foundation, Vivarium component manifest JSON, Vivarium room schematic SVG, command-contract JSON, release-readiness annex, and continuation logic for fresh Red Team Lab work.
